title: Dungeons+: More Spawners
description: Adds 3 more spawner tiers with different ranges and speeds to the game.
body:
![Title image](https://i.imgur.com/YxJJlCu.png)
This mod adds 3 more spawners with different ranges and speeds to the game. It adds Golden, Diamond and Netherite spawner tiers. There are already more features planed for this mod. But this first version is pretty simple and only adds those spawners.

### Spawner Tiers | | Normal Spawner | Golden Spawner | Diamond Spawner | Netherite Spawner | |-----------------------|----------------|----------------|-----------------|-------------------| | Max spawnable entitys | 4 entitys | 10 entitys | 15 entitys | 20 entitys | | Max spawn delay | 80s | 60s | 50s | 30s | | Min spawn delay | 20s | 20s | 20s | 5s | | Player range | 16 Blocks | 20 blocks | 25 blocks | 32 blocks | | Max entitys in range | 6 entitys | 20 entitys | 30 entitys | 60 entitys | _(Not accurate will edit them soon)_
